title: Wyoming Statutes § 1-1-119 — Release or covenant not to sue
text: When a release or a covenant not to sue or not to enforce judgment is given in good faith to one (1) of two (2) or more persons liable in tort for the same injury or the same wrongful death, it does not discharge any of the other tortfeasors from liability for the injury or wrongful death unless its terms so provide.
chapter_title: CHAPTER  1 - GENERAL PROVISIONS AS TO CIVIL ACTIONS
